title: Standard Pekingese Adoption Agreement
body:
IMPERIALPAWS PEKINGESE – OFFICIAL ADOPTION AGREEMENT

This Adoption Agreement ("Agreement") is made and entered into on [DATE], by and between ImperialPaws Pekingese ("Breeder / Seller") and [BUYER_NAME] ("Adopting Parent / Buyer").

1. IDENTIFICATION OF PUPPY
1.1 The Breeder agrees to place and transfer ownership of one (1) purebred Pekingese puppy into the care of the Buyer as specified in the accompanying adoption record & invoice.

2. HEALTH GUARANTEE & VETERINARY MONITORING
2.1 The Breeder guarantees that the puppy is in good health, age-appropriately vaccinated, and wormed at the time of transfer.
2.2 The Buyer agrees to have the puppy examined by a licensed veterinarian within 72 hours of receiving the puppy to validate this guarantee.

3. CARE AND WELLBEING COMMITMENT
3.1 The Buyer promises to provide a safe, indoor, loving home environment with appropriate nutrition, regular grooming, and timely medical attention.
3.2 The Buyer agrees that the puppy will not be housed outdoors or surrendered to any shelter or third-party resale entity.

4. ADOPTION FEE AND PAYMENT TERMS
4.1 The adoption fee is set forth in the official ImperialPaws invoice. All adoption fees are non-refundable once placement is finalized.

5. ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AND SIGNATURES
By signing below or fulfilling the adoption invoice, both parties agree to all terms and conditions stated in this Agreement.

_________________________________________
Breeder Signature (ImperialPaws Pekingese)

_________________________________________
Adopting Parent Signature: [BUYER_NAME]
Date: [DATE]
